microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end deployment** of Azure's recovery validation program, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills with **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivered a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new standard for continuous validation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under C-suite visibility, including serving as deployment lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** with strict compliance requirements.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured execution workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing agent-driven drill capacity by 21% — directly mirroring agentic AI deployment at scale.

Defined success metrics, monitored deployment health via usage telemetry, and surfaced operational risk early — translating customer friction from enterprise partners into crisp, **data-backed roadmap improvements** with engineering.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI agent adoption** across 14 Azure service teams by leading user demos and hands-on training sessions, translating complex agentic workflows into accessible deployment playbooks that saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with enterprise Azure teams, identifying critical feature gaps and successfully influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation for production use.

Improved semantic search adoption and data integrity by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered retrieval system** with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and accelerating engineer onboarding across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams across engineering and operations.

Built a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches — conducted discovery with 20+ service teams, identified **81 hours of manual effort** per region, and defined a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize automation investments and surface adoption gaps with real-time, data-backed visibility into deployment health.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy end-to-end — mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and defining rollout requirements with engineering and ops stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain deployment velocity across cross-functional teams.

Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to deploy automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual intervention across multi-team production rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning end-to-end scoping, proposal, and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly engagements — implementing a structured CRM process that reduced turnaround time and improved conversion rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website funnel and Google Business profile for local search and borrower-facing discovery.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering a data-backed framework that shaped operational and GTM strategy going forward.
